Label: Description
Value:
Road network across the region from OSM. Includes everything tagged with highway: motorways, residential streets, service roads, footways, and trails. Useful for routing, accessibility analysis, and evacuation planning. OpenStreetMap is a free, collaborative world map built by volunteers. Completeness varies by region: urban areas are usually well-mapped, remote areas may be incomplete. Cross-check critical decisions with local field knowledge.
  • Source: OpenStreetMap
  • OSM tags: Key:highway
  • Part of many exports grid on HDX by the HOT

Label: Caveats/Comments
Value: OpenStreetMap data is crowd sourced and cannot be considered to be exhaustive
